reviews.review_msg: Dr. A is the GOAT! Organized curriculum, incredibly engaging lectures (her examples are fun and intuitive), assignments and exams are straightforward with no curveballs, and happily answers students' questions during lecture and office hours. It's clear she cares about everyone's education. You will not find a better instructor for COGS 100!

Loved COGS 100 with her! Her tests are and assignments are super straightforward, and she always checks up on the class to make sure we get it. Loved having her as a prof and I would 100% take it with her again!

Zara is an amazing professor, I would 100% reccommend this course to anyone needing a breadth requirement. She is very understanding and makes lectures very enjoyable, genuinely one of the best profs at SFU. The class itself was not too difficult. She creates a great learning environment and tries her best to remember all her students.

Favourite prof! Answered any and all questions with ease, frequent check ins with class to make sure we were on track/understanding. Very engaging lectures, straightforward tests/assignments, understanding and relatable, clear communication through canvas, created a comfortable space (the first uni class I've had with free-flowing discussions)10/10
10/10 prof, I would take my entire undergrad with her if I could
